title: Hieracium cryptonaevum
taxonomy: Hieracium cryptonaevum is a species of plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It belongs to the genus Hieracium, which is commonly known as hawkweeds. The genus Hieracium is divided into several subgenera, and Hieracium cryptonaevum is classified under the subgenus Hieracium. Within the subgenus, it is further classified as a member of the section Hieracium. The exact classification within the species can be complex and is often subject to ongoing research and revision.

intro: Hieracium cryptonaevum, commonly known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like plants group. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system.
